## Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it matter?

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant docs updated, or I confirmed no docs changes were needed
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` if browser behavior changed

## Release notes

- [ ] Version bump included if this should ship to production
- [ ] Follow-up work noted if anything was intentionally deferred
